---
name: 🐛 Report a Bug (CRITICAL)
about: Found a glitch in the matrix? Open a critical scroll here so the Forge Master can fix it.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug, critical
assignees: DevFrisly
---

### 🛑 Description of the Glitch
Please provide a clear and concise description of what the bug is. (e.g., "The MRPACK Converter freezes at 99% when trying to convert the Fabulously Optimized modpack.")

### 👣 Steps to Reproduce
How can the Forge Master replicate this issue?
1. Go to '...'
2. Upload the file '....'
3. Click on '....'
4. See error: '...'

### 🔮 Expected Behavior
What did you expect to happen instead? (e.g., "I expected the download button to appear with a .zip file.")

### 💻 Environment Details
Because AméthMC runs in the browser, this information is **critical** for us to fix the issue!
- **Device:** [e.g., Desktop PC, MacBook, iPhone 14]
- **Operating System:** [e.g., Windows 11, macOS Sonoma, iOS 17]
- **Browser & Version:** [e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 119, Safari]

### 📸 Screenshots or Console Logs
If applicable, drag and drop screenshots here to help explain your problem. 

*(Pro-tip: If the site crashed, press `F12` (or `Ctrl+Shift+I`) to open the Developer Tools, click the "Console" tab, and take a screenshot of any red error text!)*

---
**Before submitting:** Please do a quick search of the existing issues to make sure someone else hasn't already reported this!
